name: Lifevantage Corp
business: Lifevantage Corporation sells nutrigenomic activators, dietary supplements, weight management products, pre- and pro-biotics, skin and hair care products, and nootropics through a direct sales model using independent consultants. The company's flagship product line is Protandim, and it also sells LifeVantage, TrueScience, PhysIQ, Petandim, and AXIO brands. Revenue is generated from two geographic regions: Americas and Asia/Pacific & Europe.
sellsTo: Independent consultants (independent contractors who sell products to end customers)
Customers (end consumers purchasing for personal use)

Geographic markets: United States, Mexico, Japan, Australia, Hong Kong, Canada, Thailand, United Kingdom, Netherlands, Germany, Taiwan, Austria, Spain, Ireland, Belgium, New Zealand, Singapore, and additional countries for personal consumption only

exposures.sentence: We engage in the identification, research, development, formulation and sale of advanced nutrigenomic activators, dietary supplements, weight management products, pre- and pro-biotics, skin and hair care products, and nootropics.

We are subject to evolving laws, policies, and contractual obligations related to data privacy and security, including cybersecurity, and our actual or perceived failure to comply with such obligations or perceived failure to maintain the integrity of our data could expose us to data loss or litigation, harm our reputation, subject us to significant fines and liability, or otherwise adversely affect our business, prospects, financial condition, and operating results.

We sell our products in the United States, Mexico, Japan, Australia, Hong Kong, Canada, Thailand, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Germany, Taiwan, Austria, Spain, Ireland, Belgium, New Zealand, and Singapore.

catalysts.event: Launch of MindBody GLP-1 System in the United States
catalysts.sentence: when we launched our MindBody GLP-1 System in October 2024

catalysts.event: Launch of Evolve Compensation Plan in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Singapore markets
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we launched the Evolve Compensation Plan for our independent consultants in other markets, including Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Singapore.

catalysts.event: Planned roll-out of Evolve Compensation Plan in Thailand
catalysts.sentence: We plan to roll out the Evolve Compensation Plan in Thailand once we receive the appropriate government approvals.

catalysts.event: Ceased operations in the Philippines and closed that market
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, we ceased operations in the Philippines and closed that market.
